name: Buffer Access with Incorrect Length Value
description: The product uses an incorrect length value in sequential buffer operations, potentially causing access to memory outside the intended buffer. When the length value exceeds the destination size, a buffer overflow occurs.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides a length value that is used in a buffer copy or access operation at a STORAGE node, without a CONTROL node verifying the length matches the destination buffer's actual size.
